incidents.title: Crowd Surge at Gate B1
incidents.description: Unusual crowd density detected near Gate B1. Multiple fans reporting difficulty moving.
incidents.aiSummary: Crowd density at Gate B1 has exceeded 95% capacity. The surge coincides with late arrivals for the second half. Estimated 2,400 fans still queuing.
incidents.aiRecommendation: Open auxiliary lanes at Gate B1. Redirect overflow to Gates A2 and C1.

incidents.title: Medical Emergency Section 214
incidents.description: Fan collapsed in Section 214, Row 12. Possible heat stroke.
incidents.aiSummary: Male fan collapsed during second half. Temperature recorded at 32°C.
incidents.aiRecommendation: Immediate first aid with cooling measures. Prepare ambulance for potential hospital transfer.

announcements.title: Gate B1 Congestion Advisory
announcements.message: Heavy congestion near Gate B1. Please use Gates A2 or C1 for faster entry.
